_about: USM Configurator presets — named, ready-to-build USM Haller configurations. 'columns'/'rows'/'depths' are lists of bay sizes in mm along X/Z/Y. Panel options: back_panels, shelves, dividers (booleans) and/or an explicit 'panels' list of {ix,iy,iz,face,color}. Extend with your own rows in ~/.usmconfigurator/presets.json (same schema, a 'presets' list).

presets.name: Single Cube
presets.notes: one bay, back panel — the smallest USM module

presets.name: Sideboard 2x2
presets.notes: classic low sideboard, 1500x700 mm, back panels + shelf

presets.name: Credenza 3-wide
presets.notes: three-bay credenza with vertical dividers and backs

presets.name: Bookshelf Tall
presets.notes: open bookshelf, 3 wide x 4 tall, shelves + dividers, no backs

presets.name: TV Board
presets.notes: wide low media board, deep bays, full back

presets.name: Accent Shelf (mixed colours)
presets.notes: shelves plus two accent-coloured back panels via an explicit panel list
